SEO.TITLE: Layoff Egypt – Real Layoff Stories from Egypt
SEO.DESCRIPTION: Explore real anonymous layoff stories in Egypt. Share your experience and see what’s happening in the job market.
SEO.KEYWORDS: layoff egypt, layoffs in egypt, job loss egypt, tech layoffs egypt

LANDING.HERO_H1: Layoff Egypt – Real Stories from the Egyptian Job Market
LANDING.INTRO: Layoff Egypt is a platform where people anonymously share their layoff experiences in Egypt, helping others understand layoffs in Egypt and the reality of job loss in Egypt—especially across tech layoffs in Egypt and fast-changing startups.
LANDING.H2_WHY: Why people are getting laid off in Egypt
LANDING.P_WHY: Layoffs in Egypt are impacting professionals across tech, startups, and traditional industries. Economic uncertainty, restructuring, and cost-cutting can lead to sudden job loss in Egypt—even for high performers. Layoff Egypt helps you understand what’s happening through real stories from the Egyptian job market.
LANDING.P_ANON: This platform collects anonymous layoff stories in Egypt so others can learn, prepare, and feel less alone. If you’re searching for “layoff egypt”, “tech layoffs egypt”, or “job loss egypt”, you’ll find real experiences written by people who lived it.
LANDING.P_SHARE: Sharing a layoff experience can help others navigate layoffs in Egypt. Submit your story anonymously and help build a clearer picture of the job market in Egypt.

HOME.TITLE: Stories
HOME.LEAD: Real experiences shared by people in Egypt.
HOME.ERR_LOAD: Could not load stories. Please try again.
HOME.EMPTY_LEAD: Try clearing filters or searching with fewer keywords.

SUBMIT.PAGE_LEAD: Share what happened. Fields marked * are required.
SUBMIT.LOCATION_HINT: Optional — helps others understand context without naming exact office.
SUBMIT.SEVERANCE_HINT: Optional — e.g. months of pay, none, or NDA.
SUBMIT.COMPANY_HINT: Optional — leave blank if you prefer not to name the employer.
SUBMIT.ERR_STORY_MIN: Please add a bit more detail (at least 20 characters).
SUBMIT.ANONYMOUS: Submit anonymously (hide company name if published)
SUBMIT.THANKS_LEAD: Your story has been submitted for review.
SUBMIT.ERR_SUBMIT_FAILED: Could not submit your story. Please try again.

REPORT.TITLE: Report this story
REPORT.MESSAGE_PLACEHOLDER: Add context that helps moderators review…
REPORT.ERR_SUBMIT: Could not send the report. Please try again.
REPORT.TOAST_OK: Thanks — we will review this report.

ADMIN.TITLE: Admin
ADMIN.LEAD: Moderation inbox — review, approve, or remove stories from the public list.
ADMIN.APPROVED_LEAD: Published stories. You can remove approval to return them to the pending queue.
ADMIN.ERR_LOAD: Could not load pending stories. Please try again.
ADMIN.ERR_UPDATE: Could not update the story status. Please try again.

TOAST.UNAPPROVE_OK: Approval removed. Moved back to pending.
TOAST.UNAPPROVE_ERR: Could not remove approval. Please try again.

DIALOG.APPROVE_MESSAGE: Approve the submission from {{company}}? This demo only removes it from the pending list.
DIALOG.REJECT_MESSAGE: Reject the submission from {{company}}? It will be removed from the pending list.
DIALOG.UNAPPROVE_MESSAGE: Remove approval for {{company}}? It will be moved back to the pending queue.
DIALOG.BULK_APPROVE_MESSAGE: Approve {{count}} submission(s)? This will publish them.
DIALOG.BULK_UNAPPROVE_MESSAGE: Move {{count}} approved story/stories back to pending?
